mapper.select: SELECT WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, CASE WHEN TRIM(ASMNT_DATE) = '' THEN '' ELSE ASMNT_DATE END AS ASMNT_DATE, ASMNT_START_TIME, ASMNT_END_TIME, ASMNT_PLACE, ASMNT_CONTENT, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, USE_YN FROM ESG.TB_RESULT_OF_RISK_ASSESSMENT_TRAINING WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId} AND SUBSTR(ASMNT_DATE, 0, 5) = #{searchText} ORDER BY SUBSTR(ASMNT_DATE, 0, 7) DESC, USE_YN DESC, ASMNT_DATE DESC, CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(DOC_NO::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS DOC_NO FROM ESG.TB_RESULT_OF_RISK_ASSESSMENT_TRAINING WHERE write_year = #{writeYear}
INSERT INTO ESG.TB_RESULT_OF_RISK_ASSESSMENT_TRAINING ( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, ASMNT_DATE, ASMNT_START_TIME, ASMNT_END_TIME, ASMNT_PLACE, ASMNT_CONTENT, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{asmntDate}, #{asmntStartTime}, #{asmntEndTime}, #{asmntPlace}, #{asmntContent}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, ASMNT_DATE, ASMNT_START_TIME, ASMNT_END_TIME, ASMNT_PLACE, ASMNT_CONTENT, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, USE_YN FROM ESG.TB_RESULT_OF_RISK_ASSESSMENT_TRAINING WHERE WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND DOC_TYPE = #{docType} AND DOC_NO = #{docNo}
SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_NM AS FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE AS DOC_TYPE, "extension" FROM ESG.TB_SYS_FILE WHERE TARGET_ID = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) AND TARGET_TYPE = #{docType}

SELECT TAI.TARGET_TYPE, TAI.TARGET_ID, TAI.HR_ID, TAI.HR_NM, TAI.ORGN_NM, TAI.JBRP_NM, TAI.SIGNATURE, TAI.PARAM, TAI.CREATED_AT, TAI.CREATED_BY, SF.FILE_ID AS LOGO_ID FROM ESG.TB_APPROVAL_INFO TAI LEFT JOIN ESG.TB_SYS_FILE SF ON SF.TARGET_ID = TAI.HR_ID AND SF.TARGET_TYPE = 'hrImg' WHERE TAI.TARGET_ID = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) AND TAI.TARGET_TYPE = #{docType}
select t1.write_year , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.comp_id from esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training t1 where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
